testcase.classname: UsersController getSubmissions should propagate NotFoundException for unknown username

testcase.classname: UsersController getSubmissions should use page=1 when page query param is not provided

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return submission details for ACCEPTED submission

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return all required fields with correct snake_case naming

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return numeric values as strings (per API contract)

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return default metrics 0 when null in DB
testcase.name: SubmissionsService findOne should return default metrics 0 when null in DB

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return empty string for user_answer when userOutput is null
testcase.name: SubmissionsService findOne should return empty string for user_answer when userOutput is null

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return PENDING status correctly
testcase.name: SubmissionsService findOne should return PENDING status correctly

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should return WRONG_ANSWER status correctly
testcase.name: SubmissionsService findOne should return WRONG_ANSWER status correctly

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should throw NotFoundException for non-existent submission

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService findOne should throw NotFoundException with submission ID in message

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should process statuses and finalize as ACCEPTED, then update user stats on first AC
testcase.name: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should process statuses and finalize as ACCEPTED, then update user stats on first AC

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should not update user stats if there was a previous ACCEPTED submission
testcase.name: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should not update user stats if there was a previous ACCEPTED submission

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should not update user stats for non-ACCEPTED outcomes
testcase.name: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should not update user stats for non-ACCEPTED outcomes

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should map INTERNAL_ERROR to RUNTIME_ERROR
testcase.name: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should map INTERNAL_ERROR to RUNTIME_ERROR

testcase.classname: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should skip stats update when submission cannot be reloaded
testcase.name: SubmissionsService runJudgeForSubmission (mock worker) should skip stats update when submission cannot be reloaded

testcase.classname: InterviewCandidatesService create should throw BadRequestException when endTime is before startTime

testcase.classname: JudgeService should be defined
testcase.name: JudgeService should be defined

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return INTERNAL_ERROR for java
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return INTERNAL_ERROR for java

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should preserve expectedOutput in result
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should preserve expectedOutput in result

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return empty stdout/stderr for unsupported language
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return empty stdout/stderr for unsupported language

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with supported languages should run python3 with the python image
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with supported languages should run python3 with the python image

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C++ with gcc image
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C++ with gcc image

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C with gcc image
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C with gcc image

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return ACCEPTED when stdout matches expectedOutput
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return ACCEPTED when stdout matches expectedOutput

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return WRONG_ANSWER when stdout does not match
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return WRONG_ANSWER when stdout does not match

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return RUNTIME_ERROR on non-zero exit code
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return RUNTIME_ERROR on non-zero exit code

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED when process is killed via SIGTERM
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED when process is killed via SIGTERM

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return INTERNAL_ERROR when docker command is not found (ENOENT)
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return INTERNAL_ERROR when docker command is not found (ENOENT)

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should include stdout and stderr from docker in the result
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should include stdout and stderr from docker in the result

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should normalise trailing whitespace / CRLF for comparison
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should normalise trailing whitespace / CRLF for comparison

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should clean up the temp workdir even when docker fails
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should clean up the temp workdir even when docker fails

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should write both submission.js and runner.js to the workdir
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should write both submission.js and runner.js to the workdir

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should send the input string to docker stdin
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should send the input string to docker stdin

testcase.name: AuthService login should return expires_in as string (not number)

testcase.classname: AuthService login should look up user by username
testcase.name: AuthService login should look up user by username

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException when user not found
testcase.name: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException when user not found

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException for wrong SHA-256 password
testcase.name: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException for wrong SHA-256 password

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException if plain password (not sha256) is used
testcase.name: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException if plain password (not sha256) is used

testcase.classname: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException with generic message (no info leak)
testcase.name: AuthService login should throw UnauthorizedException with generic message (no info leak)

testcase.classname: AuthService login should handle ADMIN role correctly
testcase.name: AuthService login should handle ADMIN role correctly

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should create a new user with sha256 password
testcase.name: AuthService signup should create a new user with sha256 password

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should call prisma.user.create with a bcrypt hash (not plain sha256)
testcase.name: AuthService signup should call prisma.user.create with a bcrypt hash (not plain sha256)

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should return user without passwordHash field
testcase.name: AuthService signup should return user without passwordHash field

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should default role to CANDIDATE if not specified
testcase.name: AuthService signup should default role to CANDIDATE if not specified

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should create candidate account without email
testcase.name: AuthService signup should create candidate account without email

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should always force role to CANDIDATE regardless of input
testcase.name: AuthService signup should always force role to CANDIDATE regardless of input

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should ignore role=QUESTIONER and force CANDIDATE
testcase.name: AuthService signup should ignore role=QUESTIONER and force CANDIDATE

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should allow signup without email for CANDIDATE (even with role=EXAMINER)
testcase.name: AuthService signup should allow signup without email for CANDIDATE (even with role=EXAMINER)

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should throw ConflictException for duplicate username
testcase.name: AuthService signup should throw ConflictException for duplicate username

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should throw ConflictException for duplicate email
testcase.name: AuthService signup should throw ConflictException for duplicate email

testcase.classname: AuthService signup should check both username and email for conflicts via OR query

testcase.name: AuthService validateUserById should not return passwordHash

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should be defined
testcase.name: RolesGuard should be defined

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should return true when no roles are required
testcase.name: RolesGuard should return true when no roles are required

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should return true when required roles is empty array
testcase.name: RolesGuard should return true when required roles is empty array

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should return true when user has the required ADMIN role
testcase.name: RolesGuard should return true when user has the required ADMIN role

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should return true when user has the required CANDIDATE role
testcase.name: RolesGuard should return true when user has the required CANDIDATE role

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should return true when ADMIN accesses any role-protected endpoint
testcase.name: RolesGuard should return true when ADMIN accesses any role-protected endpoint

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should return true when user role matches one of multiple required roles
testcase.name: RolesGuard should return true when user role matches one of multiple required roles

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user role does not match
testcase.name: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user role does not match

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException with correct message
testcase.name: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException with correct message

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user is undefined
testcase.name: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user is undefined

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user is null
testcase.name: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user is null

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should throw ForbiddenException when user has no role property

testcase.classname: RolesGuard should use reflector.getAllAndOverride with handler and class

testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should be defined

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should return true when API key matches
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should return true when API key matches

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when API key does not match
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when API key does not match

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException with correct message
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException with correct message

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when API key header is missing
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when API key header is missing

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when INTERNAL_API_KEY env is not set
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when INTERNAL_API_KEY env is not set

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when both env and header are empty strings
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should throw UnauthorizedException when both env and header are empty strings

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should read key from x-internal-api-key header (lowercase)
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should read key from x-internal-api-key header (lowercase)

testcase.classname: InternalAuthGuard should be case-sensitive for the API key value
testcase.name: InternalAuthGuard should be case-sensitive for the API key value
